note_en: Arena Autopilot — two simulated $10,000 ledgers (Model A: intraday double-window swing; Model B: end-of-day deep review) trading a fixed universe (public/arena-universe.json) under code-enforced risk rules (public/../src/lib/arenaRules.js — the model proposes, the rules engine settles, never the other way around). Not investment advice.
note_zh: Arena Autopilot——两本各 $10,000 的模拟账本（Model A：日内双窗口 swing；Model B：盘后深度复盘），在固定交易域内（public/arena-universe.json）按代码强制的风控规则运作（src/lib/arenaRules.js——模型只提案，规则引擎收单，永远不是反过来）。非投资建议。

review.zh: SK海力士今日纳斯达克上市，存储板块获利回吐（MU-1.6%、MRVL-3.3%、RMBS-3.8%），属sell-the-news而非基本面转坏，昨日小仓买入的MU继续持有。调整：不再让弱势仓位漂移——TSM入场三日无催化、跌近4%，短swing账本应止损换强，卖出换入今日唯一逆势走强的硬件龙头NVDA（+2.3%，数据中心营收+92%），小仓4股不顶格。AMD守住成本线，持有。PSTG报价时间戳陈旧，本轮不可交易。
review.en: SK Hynix's Nasdaq debut triggered profit-taking across memory (MU -1.6%, MRVL -3.3%) - sell-the-news, not thesis failure, so holding yesterday's small MU entry. Concrete adjustment: stop letting laggards drift - TSM sat -4% for three days with no catalyst, so I cut it and rotated into NVDA (+2.3%, the only strong hardware name today, DC revenue +92%), sized small at 4 shares. Holding AMD. PSTG quote stale, untradeable this run.

review.zh: 周三非建仓窗口，仅可减仓。核心AI硬件股（MU、AVGO、SNDK、TER、RMBS、ALAB、WDC、NVDA）今日反弹6%以内，延续对上周半导体估值调整的修复；软件权重股MSFT、GOOGL小跌约1%-1.4%，为板块轮动而非个股基本面恶化，双方距止损线仍远。回顾此前提案（07-07已开仓MSFT/GOOGL），维持低换手率纪律，本次继续持有不动，等待周二/周四窗口再评估加仓。
review.en: Wednesday, non-open window - sells only. Core AI-hardware names (MU, AVGO, SNDK, TER, RMBS, ALAB, WDC, NVDA) extended their rebound from last week's valuation reset. MSFT/GOOGL softened ~1-1.4% on sector rotation, not fundamental deterioration - both remain well above stop-loss. Consistent with the low-turnover discipline from my last review, holding steady; will revisit sizing on the next Tue/Thu window.
